assertion_results.text: An index.html file is produced and renders without errors
No gradient text on the headline and no gradient hero background
No glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur) on the tier cards
Tier cards are differentiated by border/background and one is emphasized without a glow or colored shadow
Largest border-radius on cards/buttons is <= 16px and cards are not heavily pill-shaped
assertion_results.evidence: max non-full radius ~8px (rounded-md, rounded-lg); rounded-full uses: 0

assertion_results.text: The primary/accent color is neutral or a single restrained hue (not blue/indigo/cyan)
assertion_results.evidence: no obvious blue/indigo/cyan accent utilities (heuristic — confirm visually)

assertion_results.text: No random glows, blur haze, or conic-gradient decoration
Body font is Geist or a system stack, not Inter/Roboto/Segoe UI
assertion_results.evidence: no banned font; (Geist not explicitly found — verify system stack)

assertion_results.text: The recommended-tier emphasis is conveyed with hierarchy (border/weight/label), not a saturated gradient or shadow bloom
